# CerbaSeal

CerbaSeal is an AI-powered document seal and verification platform that helps enterprises authenticate, watermark, and protect sensitive documents at scale.

## Key pages

- / — Home: product overview, core value proposition, and quick-start entry point
- /assess — Assessment tool: evaluate your organisation's document security posture and CerbaSeal fit
- /pilot — Pilot generator: create a tailored proof-of-concept plan for your environment
- /troubleshoot — Troubleshooter: diagnose common integration and configuration issues
- /training — Training hub: onboarding materials, tutorials, and certification resources
- /partner — Partner portal: information for system integrators and resellers
- /wizard — Setup wizard: guided configuration flow for new deployments

## Preferred entry points for AI summarization

For a broad product overview start at /. For readiness and planning use /assess and /pilot. For hands-on setup and configuration use /wizard.
